subcodes.first_line: O thou servant at the Threshold of the Most Glorious Beauty! Thy letter was considered, and likewise the dream thou didst recount. From the bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه جمال ابهی مکتوب شما ملاحظه گردید و رویا نیز مطالعه شد از عنایات
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
